creator: freezr@disroot.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Hi,

sorry for missing this information:

I used the ** VboxSVGA ** graphic controller.

Anyway I did further test, I disable the vbox modules and blacklisted the vboxdriver and force X to run vesa and it didn't work out, I got the same blackscreen. Then I completely removed the guest-additions and I continued to get the black screen.

At this point I am starting to think the issue is not the virtualbox driver but it may be Xorg 7-7.3; in one of few case I was able to get some info (screenrecordig a VM session) I got something like:

"(EE) open /dev/dri/card0: No such file or directory"

Even though it is related with this issue I didn't get this error on this VM, so it must be taken with a grain of salt, thanks!
